## [00:00 - 03:00]

Alright guys, so here's how we're going to set up the first round of rapid fire testing for coaching or online courses. Now we're going to set this up as a lead generation campaign objective and I'm going to call this campaign RF number one because we'll be testing both the audience and offer under this. And then under the ad set, I'm going to name this one of the personas that I'm testing out here. So for example, let's say that this is Facebook marketers. And let's go ahead and save to draft. Okay, so under your ad set, you're going to choose the targeting that you've selected. And here's how we're going to set up our ads. So I'm going to name this ad number one. We're going to be testing out at least three different ad variations per ad set. And most of your ad sets will just have the same exact ads. Now because we're using a lead ad objective, unfortunately, you're not going to be able to share the ad ID across different ad sets. So you're going to have to essentially duplicate the ad into the other ad sets, but I'll show you how to do that in a moment. So what we're going to do here is select our image. And you're going to paste in the copy that you wrote for this, add in your headline. Again, we're going straight to for the kill here, we're just promoting the offer, whatever that is. And we're going to do a learn more here. Now here's where we need to attach the lead form. Now what I like to do here is essentially copy the copy that I'm using in my ad. And what I'm going to do is click next. We're going to name this the name of our persona and RF one. And we're just going to use more volume here instead of higher intent because this is rapid fire testing. Now under intro, we're going to use the same headline that we are in our ad to keep the scent. This is super important. And then I'm going to basically paste in the copy. Okay. And this is actually what we found works best is when you just use the same image, almost the same copy, etc.

## [03:00 - 05:44]

Under questions, we're just going to leave this as the default name and email address and then privacy policy. We're going to paste in our privacy policy on our thank you screen. What we're going to do is congrats. And we could essentially link this to one of our groups. Now obviously there's going to be a bit of collateral damage here because people are going to be opting in, but they won't be sent the training or the offer. That's okay. It's going to be about 20, 20 people. You can just email them later on and let them know that, hey, sorry, there was a glitch in the system. Here's the access that you're after. We're going to click this and then click publish. Now what I'm going to do is I'm going to click on duplicate this ad. And I'm essentially just going to change the image and at least create, duplicate this at least two more times so that there's three ads under this ad side. And then what I've done is what you'll see once I've set up the three ads under here, and you can even have more ads. That's fine as well. But I've then clicked on this and clicked duplicate. And I've essentially created a different ad set for my different persona. So in this instance, there's a general one and then one for coaches. Now if you have different copy for these people, which you likely will do, that's highly encouraged, that means that you need to create a separate lead ad form for each of these personas. So at the ad level, just make sure that after you duplicate your initial ad set that you go in and edit the ad level so that it's a new lead form that is using the right copy for that persona. And this is essentially how to set up the first round of rapid fire testing.
